Selectors.Count: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM src.stp_tx_feedbatch fb WHERE fb.isactive = TRUE AND fb.feedbatchid > @LastID
Selectors.Selector: WITH feed_reference AS (SELECT fb.feedbatchid,fb.feedbatchcode AS lotNumber,fb.quantity AS qty,u.code AS uom,pd.gtin AS gtin,COALESCE(pd.shortdescription,'Feed Batch') AS itemName,pf.productformname AS productForm,sp.scientificname,sp.species3alphacode AS speciesCode,fb.feedmillpartyid AS operatorId,p.partyname AS operatorName,p.addressline1 AS address1,p.addressline2 AS address2,p.city AS city,p.stateprovince AS state,p.country AS country,loc.locationcode AS locCode,loc.locationname AS locName,loc.addressline1 AS locAddress1,loc.addressline2 AS locAddress2,loc.city AS locCity,loc.stateprovince AS locState,loc.country AS locCountry,loc.registrationnumber AS locRegistrationnumber,fb.productiondate AS eventTime,ft.feedtypecode AS feedType,ps.proteinsourcecode AS proteinSource,fb.feedformula,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS humanpolicyId,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS humanpolicyValue,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS humanpolicyStandard,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS humanpolicyAgency,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS harvestId,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS harvestValue,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS harvestStandard,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS harvestAgency,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS harvestcocId,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS harvestcocValue,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS harvestcocStandard,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS harvestcocAgency FROM src.stp_tx_feedbatch fb LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_uom u ON fb.uomid=u.uomid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_parties p ON fb.feedmillpartyid=p.partyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_locations loc ON fb.feedmilllocationid=loc.locationid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_feedtype ft ON fb.feedtypeid=ft.feedtypeid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_proteinsource ps ON fb.proteinsourceid=ps.proteinsourceid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_lots l ON l.lotcode=fb.feedbatchcode LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productdefinitions pd ON l.productdefinitionid=pd.productdefinitionid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productforms pf ON pd.productformid=pf.productformid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_species sp ON pf.speciesid=sp.speciesid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_feedbatch_certificates fbc ON fb.feedbatchid=fbc.feedbatchid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_certificates c ON fbc.certificateid=c.certificateid WHERE fb.isactive=TRUE AND fb.feedbatchid>@LastID GROUP BY fb.feedbatchid,fb.feedbatchcode,fb.quantity,u.code,pd.gtin,pd.shortdescription,pf.productformname,sp.scientificname,sp.species3alphacode,fb.feedmillpartyid,p.partyname,p.addressline1,p.addressline2,p.city,p.stateprovince,p.country,loc.locationcode,loc.locationname,loc.addressline1,loc.addressline2,loc.city,loc.stateprovince,loc.country,loc.registrationnumber,fb.productiondate,ft.feedtypecode,ps.proteinsourcecode,fb.feedformula) SELECT fr.feedbatchid AS idEventRecord,fr.eventTime,'Reference' AS product_type,fr.lotNumber,fr.qty,fr.uom,fr.gtin,fr.itemName,fr.productForm,fr.scientificname,fr.speciesCode,fr.operatorId,fr.operatorName,fr.address1,fr.address2,fr.city,fr.state,fr.country,fr.locCode,fr.locName,fr.locAddress1,fr.locAddress2,fr.locCity,fr.locState,fr.locCountry,fr.locRegistrationnumber,fr.feedType,fr.proteinSource,fr.feedformula,fr.humanpolicyId,fr.humanpolicyValue,fr.humanpolicyStandard,fr.humanpolicyAgency,fr.harvestId,fr.harvestValue,fr.harvestStandard,fr.harvestAgency,fr.harvestcocId,fr.harvestcocValue,fr.harvestcocStandard,fr.harvestcocAgency FROM feed_reference fr ORDER BY fr.feedbatchid LIMIT @limit OFFSET @offset;

Selectors.Count: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM src.stp_tx_seedbatch sb WHERE sb.isactive = TRUE AND sb.seedbatchid > @LastID
Selectors.Selector: WITH seed_output AS (SELECT sb.seedbatchid, sb.seedbatchcode AS lotNumber, sb.quantity AS qty, u.code AS uom,sb.seedbatchcode AS gtin, 'Seed Batch' AS itemName, 'LIVE' AS productForm,sp.scientificname, sb.hatcherypartyid AS operatorId, hp.partyname AS operatorName,hl.locationcode AS locCode, hl.locationname AS locName, hl.country AS locCountry,hl.registrationnumber AS locRegistrationnumber, sb.hatchingdate AS eventTime,sb.broodstocksupplierid AS broodstockSupplierId, bsl.locationcode AS broodstockOriginCode,sb.healthstatus, sb.geneticline, sb.lifecycle_stage, pm.productionmethodcode AS productionMethod FROM src.stp_tx_seedbatch sb LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_uom u ON sb.uomid = u.uomid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_parties hp ON sb.hatcherypartyid = hp.partyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_locations hl ON sb.hatcherylocationid = hl.locationid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_species sp ON sb.speciesid = sp.speciesid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_parties bs ON sb.broodstocksupplierid = bs.partyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_locations bsl ON sb.broodstockoriginlocationid = bsl.locationid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productionmethod pm ON sb.productionmethodid = pm.productionmethodid WHERE sb.isactive = TRUE AND sb.seedbatchid > @LastID) SELECT so.seedbatchid AS idEventRecord, so.eventTime, 'Reference' AS product_type, so.lotNumber, so.qty,so.uom, so.gtin, so.itemName, so.productForm, so.scientificname, so.operatorId, so.operatorName,so.locCode, so.locName, so.locCountry, so.locRegistrationnumber,so.broodstockSupplierId, so.broodstockOriginCode, so.healthstatus, so.geneticline,so.lifecycle_stage, so.productionMethod FROM seed_output so ORDER BY so.seedbatchid LIMIT @limit OFFSET @offset;

Selectors.Count: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM src.stp_tx_harvestevent he WHERE he.isactive = TRUE AND he.harvesteventid > @LastID
Selectors.Selector: WITH base_event AS(SELECT he.harvesteventid,he.eventtimeutc AS eventTime,he.gpsavailable,he.latitude,he.longitude,he.locationid,he.farmcycleid,COALESCE(fc.farmpartyid,0) AS operatorId,fp.partyname AS operatorName,fp.addressline1 AS address1,fp.addressline2 AS address2,fp.city AS city,fp.stateprovince AS state,fp.country AS country,loc.locationcode AS locCode,loc.locationname AS locName,loc.addressline1 AS locAddress1,loc.addressline2 AS locAddress2,loc.city AS locCity,loc.stateprovince AS locState,loc.country AS locCountry,loc.registrationnumber AS locRegistrationnumber,fm.methodcode AS aquacultureMethod,pm.productionmethodcode AS productionMethod,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS humanpolicyId,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS humanpolicyValue,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS humanpolicyStandard,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS humanpolicyAgency,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS harvestId,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS harvestValue,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS harvestStandard,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS harvestAgency,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS harvestcocId,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS harvestcocValue,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS harvestcocStandard,MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype='urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS harvestcocAgency FROM src.stp_tx_harvestevent he JOIN src.stp_tx_farmcycle fc ON he.farmcycleid=fc.farmcycleid JOIN src.stp_md_parties fp ON fc.farmpartyid=fp.partyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_locations loc ON he.locationid=loc.locationid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_farmingmethod fm ON fc.farmingmethodid=fm.farmingmethodid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productionmethod pm ON fc.productionmethodid=pm.productionmethodid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_harvestevent_certificates hec ON he.harvesteventid=hec.harvesteventid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_certificates c ON hec.certificateid=c.certificateid WHERE he.isactive=TRUE AND he.harvesteventid>@LastID GROUP BY he.harvesteventid,fc.farmpartyid,fp.partyname,fp.addressline1,fp.addressline2,fp.city,fp.stateprovince,fp.country,loc.locationcode,loc.locationname,loc.addressline1,loc.addressline2,loc.city,loc.stateprovince,loc.country,loc.registrationnumber,fm.methodcode,pm.productionmethodcode),all_products AS(SELECT he.harvesteventid,'Output' AS product_type,l.lotcode AS lotNumber,hl.quantity AS qty,u.code AS uom,COALESCE(pd.gtin,l.lotcode) AS gtin,pd.shortdescription AS itemName,pf.productformname AS productForm,sp.scientificname,sp.species3alphacode AS speciesCode FROM src.stp_tx_harvestline hl JOIN src.stp_tx_harvestevent he ON hl.harvesteventid=he.harvesteventid JOIN src.stp_tx_lots l ON hl.lotid=l.lotid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_uom u ON hl.uomid=u.uomid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productdefinitions pd ON l.productdefinitionid=pd.productdefinitionid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productforms pf ON pd.productformid=pf.productformid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_species sp ON pf.speciesid=sp.speciesid WHERE he.harvesteventid>@LastID UNION ALL SELECT he.harvesteventid,'Input',sb.seedbatchcode,fcs.quantitystocked,u.code,sb.seedbatchcode,'Seed Batch','LIVE',sp.scientificname,sp.species3alphacode FROM src.stp_tx_harvestevent he JOIN src.stp_tx_farmcycle fc ON he.farmcycleid=fc.farmcycleid JOIN src.stp_tx_farmcycle_seed fcs ON fc.farmcycleid=fcs.farmcycleid JOIN src.stp_tx_seedbatch sb ON fcs.seedbatchid=sb.seedbatchid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_uom u ON fcs.uomid=u.uomid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_species sp ON sb.speciesid=sp.speciesid WHERE he.harvesteventid>@LastID UNION ALL SELECT he.harvesteventid,'Input',fb.feedbatchcode,fcf.quantityused,u.code,fb.feedbatchcode,'Feed',NULL,NULL,NULL FROM src.stp_tx_harvestevent he JOIN src.stp_tx_farmcycle fc ON he.farmcycleid=fc.farmcycleid JOIN src.stp_tx_farmcycle_feed fcf ON fc.farmcycleid=fcf.farmcycleid JOIN src.stp_tx_feedbatch fb ON fcf.feedbatchid=fb.feedbatchid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_uom u ON fcf.uomid=u.uomid WHERE he.harvesteventid>@LastID) SELECT be.harvesteventid AS idEventRecord,be.eventTime,p.product_type,p.lotNumber,p.qty,p.uom,p.gtin,p.itemName,p.productForm,p.scientificname,p.speciesCode,be.operatorId,be.operatorName,be.address1,be.address2,be.city,be.state,be.country,be.locCode,be.locName,be.locAddress1,be.locAddress2,be.locCity,be.locState,be.locCountry,be.locRegistrationnumber,be.humanpolicyId,be.humanpolicyValue,be.humanpolicyStandard,be.humanpolicyAgency,be.harvestId,be.harvestValue,be.harvestStandard,be.harvestAgency,be.harvestcocId,be.harvestcocValue,be.harvestcocStandard,be.harvestcocAgency,be.productionMethod,be.aquacultureMethod FROM base_event be JOIN all_products p ON p.harvesteventid=be.harvesteventid ORDER BY be.harvesteventid,p.product_type DESC,p.lotNumber LIMIT @limit OFFSET @offset;

Selectors.Count: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM src.stp_tx_shipments s WHERE s.isactive = TRUE AND s.shipmentid>@LastID
Selectors.Selector: WITH base_event AS ( SELECT s.shipmentid AS ideventrecord, s.shipmentnumber, s.eventtimeutc AS eventtime, s.shipfromlocationid, s.shiptolocationid, s.carrierpartyid AS transportproviderid, tt.transporttypecode AS transporttype, s.transportvehicleid AS transportvehicleid, s.transportnumber AS transportnumber, s.informationproviderpartyid AS infoproviderid, s.productownerpartyid AS ownerid, lf.locationcode AS shipfromcode, lf.registrationnumber AS shipfromregnumber, lf.locationname AS shipfromname, lf.addressline1 AS shipfromaddress1, lf.addressline2 AS shipfromaddress2, lf.city AS shipfromcity, lf.stateprovince AS shipfromstate, lf.country AS shipfromcountry, lf.gln AS shipfromgln, lt.locationcode AS shiptocode, lt.registrationnumber AS shiptoregnumber, lt.locationname AS shiptoname, lt.addressline1 AS shiptoaddress1, lt.addressline2 AS shiptoaddress2, lt.city AS shiptocity, lt.stateprovince AS shiptostate, lt.country AS shiptocountry, lt.gln AS shiptogln, cp.partyname AS carriername, ip.partyname AS infoprovidername, po.partyname AS ownername, po.addressline1 AS owneraddress1, po.addressline2 AS owneraddress2, po.city AS ownercity, po.stateprovince AS ownerstate, po.country AS ownercountry, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS harvestcocid, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS harvestcocvalue, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS harvestcocstandard, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS harvestcocagency, l.lotid, l.lotcode AS lotnumber,'Reference' as product_type,l.lot_quantity AS qty, u.code AS uom, pd.gtin, pd.shortdescription AS itemname, pf.productformname AS productform, sp.scientificname, sp.species3alphacode AS speciescode, lu.sscc FROM src.stp_tx_shipments s JOIN src.stp_tx_shipmentlines sl ON sl.shipmentid = s.shipmentid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_logisticunit lu ON lu.logisticunitid = sl.logisticunitid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_logisticunitlot lul ON lul.logisticunitid = lu.logisticunitid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_lots l ON l.lotid = lul.lotid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_uom u ON u.uomid = l.lot_uomid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productdefinitions pd ON pd.productdefinitionid = l.productdefinitionid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productforms pf ON pf.productformid = pd.productformid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_species sp ON sp.speciesid = pf.speciesid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_locations lf ON lf.locationid = s.shipfromlocationid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_locations lt ON lt.locationid = s.shiptolocationid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_parties cp ON cp.partyid = s.carrierpartyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_parties ip ON ip.partyid = s.informationproviderpartyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_parties po ON po.partyid = s.productownerpartyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_transporttypes tt ON tt.transporttypeid = s.transporttypeid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_shipment_certificates sc ON sc.shipmentid = s.shipmentid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_certificates c ON c.certificateid = sc.certificateid WHERE s.isactive = TRUE AND s.shipmentid > @LastID GROUP BY s.shipmentid, s.shipmentnumber, s.eventtimeutc, s.shipfromlocationid, s.shiptolocationid, s.carrierpartyid, tt.transporttypecode, s.transportvehicleid, s.transportnumber, s.informationproviderpartyid, s.productownerpartyid, lf.locationcode, lf.registrationnumber, lf.locationname, lf.addressline1, lf.addressline2, lf.city, lf.stateprovince, lf.country, lf.gln, lt.locationcode, lt.registrationnumber, lt.locationname, lt.addressline1, lt.addressline2, lt.city, lt.stateprovince, lt.country, lt.gln, cp.partyname, ip.partyname, po.partyname, po.addressline1, po.addressline2, po.city, po.stateprovince, po.country, l.lotid, l.lotcode, l.lot_quantity, u.code, pd.gtin, pd.shortdescription, pf.productformname, sp.scientificname, sp.species3alphacode, lu.sscc ) SELECT * FROM base_event LIMIT @limit OFFSET @offset;

Selectors.Count: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM src.stp_tx_receipts r WHERE r.isactive = TRUE AND r.receiptid > @LastID
Selectors.Selector: WITH base_event AS ( SELECT r.receiptid AS idEventRecord, r.receiptnumber, r.eventtimeutc AS eventTime, r.receiveatlocationid, r.supplierpartyid, r.informationproviderpartyid AS infoProviderId, r.productownerpartyid AS ownerId, rl.receiptlineid, rl.lotid, 'Reference' AS product_type, l.lotcode AS lotNumber, l.lot_quantity AS qty, u.code AS uom, pd.gtin, pd.shortdescription AS itemName, pf.productformname AS productForm, sp.scientificName, sp.species3alphacode AS speciesCode, lu.sscc, rec_loc.locationcode AS receiveAtCode, rec_loc.registrationnumber AS receiveAtRegnumber, rec_loc.locationname AS receiveAtName, rec_loc.addressline1 AS receiveAtAddress1, rec_loc.addressline2 AS receiveAtAddress2, rec_loc.city AS receiveAtCity, rec_loc.stateprovince AS receiveAtState, rec_loc.country AS receiveAtCountry, rec_loc.gln AS receiveAtGln, sparty.partyname AS suppliername, ip.partyname AS infoProviderName, op.partyname AS ownerName, op.addressline1 AS ownerAddress1, op.addressline2 AS ownerAddress2, op.city AS ownerCity, op.stateprovince AS ownerState, op.country AS ownerCountry, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS harvestcocid, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS harvestcocvalue, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS harvestcocstandard, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS harvestcocagency, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS humanpolicyid, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS humanpolicyvalue, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS humanpolicystandard, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS humanpolicyagency FROM src.stp_tx_receipts r JOIN src.stp_tx_receiptlines rl ON rl.receiptid = r.receiptid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_logisticunit lu ON lu.logisticunitid = rl.logisticunitid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_logisticunitlot lul ON lul.logisticunitid = lu.logisticunitid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_lots l ON l.lotid = lul.lotid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_uom u ON u.uomid = COALESCE(rl.uomid, l.lot_uomid) LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productdefinitions pd ON pd.productdefinitionid = l.productdefinitionid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productforms pf ON pf.productformid = pd.productformid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_species sp ON sp.speciesid = pf.speciesid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_locations rec_loc ON rec_loc.locationid = r.receiveatlocationid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_parties sparty ON sparty.partyid = r.supplierpartyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_parties ip ON ip.partyid = r.informationproviderpartyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_parties op ON op.partyid = r.productownerpartyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_receipt_certificates rc ON rc.receiptid = r.receiptid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_certificates c ON c.certificateid = rc.certificateid WHERE r.isactive = TRUE AND r.receiptid > @LastID GROUP BY r.receiptid, r.receiptnumber, r.eventtimeutc, r.receiveatlocationid, r.supplierpartyid, r.informationproviderpartyid, r.productownerpartyid, rl.receiptlineid, l.lotid, l.lotcode, l.lot_quantity, u.code, pd.gtin, pd.shortdescription, pf.productformname, sp.scientificname, sp.species3alphacode, lu.sscc, rec_loc.locationcode, rec_loc.registrationnumber, rec_loc.locationname, rec_loc.addressline1, rec_loc.addressline2, rec_loc.city, rec_loc.stateprovince, rec_loc.country, rec_loc.gln, sparty.partyname, ip.partyname, op.partyname, op.addressline1, op.addressline2, op.city, op.stateprovince, op.country ) SELECT * FROM base_event LIMIT @limit OFFSET @offset;

Selectors.Count: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM src.stp_tx_processingbatch b WHERE b.isactive = TRUE AND b.processingbatchid > @LastID
Selectors.Selector: WITH base_event AS ( SELECT b.processingbatchid AS idEventRecord, b.batchnumber, b.eventtimeutc AS eventTime, b.facilitylocationid, b.processingtypecode, b.informationproviderpartyid AS infoProviderId, b.productownerpartyid AS ownerId, op.partyname AS ownerName, op.addressline1 AS ownerAddress1, op.addressline2 AS ownerAddress2, op.city AS ownerCity, op.stateprovince AS ownerState, op.country AS ownerCountry, ip.partyname AS infoProviderName, loc.locationcode AS locCode, loc.locationname AS locName, loc.addressline1 AS locAddress1, loc.addressline2 AS locAddress2, loc.city AS locCity, loc.stateprovince AS locState, loc.country AS locCountry, loc.registrationnumber AS locRegistrationnumber, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS humanpolicyId, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS humanpolicyValue, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS humanpolicyStandard, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS humanpolicyAgency, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS harvestId, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS harvestValue, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS harvestStandard, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS harvestAgency, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS harvestcocId, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS harvestcocValue, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS harvestcocStandard, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS harvestcocAgency FROM src.stp_tx_processingbatch b LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_locations loc ON b.facilitylocationid = loc.locationid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_parties op ON b.productownerpartyid = op.partyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_parties ip ON b.informationproviderpartyid = ip.partyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_processingbatch_certificates pbc ON pbc.processingbatchid = b.processingbatchid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_certificates c ON pbc.certificateid = c.certificateid WHERE b.isactive = TRUE AND b.processingbatchid > @LastID GROUP BY b.processingbatchid, b.batchnumber, b.eventtimeutc, b.facilitylocationid, b.processingtypecode, b.informationproviderpartyid, b.productownerpartyid, op.partyname, op.addressline1, op.addressline2, op.city, op.stateprovince, op.country, ip.partyname, loc.locationcode, loc.locationname, loc.addressline1, loc.addressline2, loc.city, loc.stateprovince, loc.country, loc.registrationnumber ), all_products AS ( SELECT b.processingbatchid, 'Input' AS product_type, l.lotcode AS lotNumber, pi.quantity AS qty, u.code AS uom, COALESCE(pd.gtin, l.lotcode) AS gtin, pd.shortdescription AS itemName, pf.productformname AS productForm, sp.scientificname, sp.species3alphacode AS speciesCode FROM src.stp_tx_processingbatch b JOIN src.stp_tx_processinginput pi ON pi.processingbatchid = b.processingbatchid JOIN src.stp_tx_lots l ON pi.lotid = l.lotid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_uom u ON pi.uomid = u.uomid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productdefinitions pd ON l.productdefinitionid = pd.productdefinitionid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productforms pf ON pd.productformid = pf.productformid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_species sp ON pf.speciesid = sp.speciesid WHERE b.isactive = TRUE AND b.processingbatchid > @LastID UNION ALL SELECT b.processingbatchid, 'Output' AS product_type, l.lotcode AS lotNumber, po.quantity AS qty, u.code AS uom, COALESCE(pd.gtin, l.lotcode) AS gtin, pd.shortdescription AS itemName, pf.productformname AS productForm, sp.scientificname, sp.species3alphacode AS speciesCode FROM src.stp_tx_processingbatch b JOIN src.stp_tx_processingoutput po ON po.processingbatchid = b.processingbatchid JOIN src.stp_tx_lots l ON po.lotid = l.lotid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_uom u ON po.uomid = u.uomid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productdefinitions pd ON l.productdefinitionid = pd.productdefinitionid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productforms pf ON pd.productformid = pf.productformid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_species sp ON pf.speciesid = sp.speciesid WHERE b.isactive = TRUE AND b.processingbatchid > @LastID ) SELECT be.idEventRecord, be.batchnumber, be.eventTime, p.product_type, p.lotNumber, p.qty, p.uom, p.gtin, p.itemName, p.productForm, p.scientificname, p.speciesCode, be.infoProviderId, be.infoProviderName, be.ownerId, be.ownerName, be.ownerAddress1, be.ownerAddress2, be.ownerCity, be.ownerState, be.ownerCountry, be.locCode, be.locName, be.locAddress1, be.locAddress2, be.locCity, be.locState, be.locCountry, be.locRegistrationnumber, be.humanpolicyId, be.humanpolicyValue, be.humanpolicyStandard, be.humanpolicyAgency, be.harvestId, be.harvestValue, be.harvestStandard, be.harvestAgency, be.harvestcocId, be.harvestcocValue, be.harvestcocStandard, be.harvestcocAgency, be.processingtypecode FROM base_event be JOIN all_products p ON p.processingbatchid = be.idEventRecord ORDER BY be.idEventRecord, p.product_type DESC, p.lotNumber LIMIT @limit OFFSET @offset;

Selectors.Count: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM src.stp_tx_aggregationevents ae WHERE ae.isactive = TRUE AND ae.aggregationeventid > @LastID
Selectors.Selector: WITH base_event AS ( SELECT ae.aggregationeventid AS idEventRecord, ae.eventnumber, ae.eventtimeutc AS eventTime, ae.locationid, ae.eventtype, ae.informationproviderpartyid AS infoProviderId, ae.productownerpartyid AS ownerId, op.partyname AS ownerName, op.addressline1 AS ownerAddress1, op.addressline2 AS ownerAddress2, op.city AS ownerCity, op.stateprovince AS ownerState, op.country AS ownerCountry, ip.partyname AS infoProviderName, loc.locationcode AS locCode, loc.locationname AS locName, loc.addressline1 AS locAddress1, loc.addressline2 AS locAddress2, loc.city AS locCity, loc.stateprovince AS locState, loc.country AS locCountry, loc.registrationnumber AS locRegistrationnumber, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS humanpolicyId, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS humanpolicyValue, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS humanpolicyStandard, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:humanPolicy' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS humanpolicyAgency, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS harvestId, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS harvestValue, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS harvestStandard, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCert' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS harvestAgency, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationidentification END) AS harvestcocId, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationvalue END) AS harvestcocValue, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationstandard END) AS harvestcocStandard, MAX(CASE WHEN c.certificationtype = 'urn:gdst:certType:harvestCoC' THEN c.certificationagency END) AS harvestcocAgency FROM src.stp_tx_aggregationevents ae LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_locations loc ON ae.locationid = loc.locationid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_parties op ON ae.productownerpartyid = op.partyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_parties ip ON ae.informationproviderpartyid = ip.partyid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_aggregation_certificates ac ON ac.aggregationeventid = ae.aggregationeventid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_certificates c ON ac.certificateid = c.certificateid WHERE ae.isactive = TRUE AND ae.aggregationeventid > @LastID GROUP BY ae.aggregationeventid, ae.eventnumber, ae.eventtimeutc, ae.locationid, ae.eventtype, ae.informationproviderpartyid, ae.productownerpartyid, op.partyname, op.addressline1, op.addressline2, op.city, op.stateprovince, op.country, ip.partyname, loc.locationcode, loc.locationname, loc.addressline1, loc.addressline2, loc.city, loc.stateprovince, loc.country, loc.registrationnumber ), all_products AS ( SELECT ae.aggregationeventid, 'Parent' AS product_type, lu.sscc AS lotNumber, NULL AS qty, NULL AS uom, COALESCE(pd.gtin, lu.sscc) AS gtin, pd.shortdescription AS itemName, pf.productformname AS productForm, sp.scientificname, sp.species3alphacode AS speciesCode FROM src.stp_tx_aggregationevents ae JOIN src.stp_tx_aggregationlines al ON al.aggregationeventid = ae.aggregationeventid JOIN src.stp_tx_logisticunit lu ON lu.logisticunitid = al.parentlogisticunitid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_logisticunitlot ul ON ul.logisticunitid = lu.logisticunitid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_lots l ON l.lotid = ul.lotid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productdefinitions pd ON pd.productdefinitionid = l.productdefinitionid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productforms pf ON pd.productformid = pf.productformid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_species sp ON pf.speciesid = sp.speciesid WHERE ae.isactive = TRUE AND ae.aggregationeventid > @LastID UNION ALL SELECT ae.aggregationeventid, 'Child' AS product_type, COALESCE(l.lotcode, lu.sscc) AS lotNumber, al.quantity AS qty, COALESCE(u.code, ul.uomid::text) AS uom, COALESCE(pd.gtin, l.lotcode, lu.sscc) AS gtin, pd.shortdescription AS itemName, pf.productformname AS productForm, sp.scientificname, sp.species3alphacode AS speciesCode FROM src.stp_tx_aggregationevents ae JOIN src.stp_tx_aggregationlines al ON al.aggregationeventid = ae.aggregationeventid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_logisticunit lu ON lu.logisticunitid = al.childlogisticunitid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_logisticunitlot ul ON ul.logisticunitid = lu.logisticunitid LEFT JOIN src.stp_tx_lots l ON l.lotid = COALESCE(al.childlotid, ul.lotid) LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_uom u ON u.uomid = COALESCE(al.uomid, ul.uomid) LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productdefinitions pd ON pd.productdefinitionid = l.productdefinitionid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_productforms pf ON pd.productformid = pf.productformid LEFT JOIN src.stp_md_species sp ON pf.speciesid = sp.speciesid WHERE ae.isactive = TRUE AND ae.aggregationeventid > @LastID ) SELECT be.idEventRecord, be.eventnumber, be.eventTime, p.product_type, p.lotNumber, p.qty, p.uom, p.gtin, p.itemName, p.productForm, p.scientificname, p.speciesCode, be.infoProviderId, be.infoProviderName, be.ownerId, be.ownerName, be.ownerAddress1, be.ownerAddress2, be.ownerCity, be.ownerState, be.ownerCountry, be.locCode, be.locName, be.locAddress1, be.locAddress2, be.locCity, be.locState, be.locCountry, be.locRegistrationnumber, be.humanpolicyId, be.humanpolicyValue, be.humanpolicyStandard, be.humanpolicyAgency, be.harvestId, be.harvestValue, be.harvestStandard, be.harvestAgency, be.harvestcocId, be.harvestcocValue, be.harvestcocStandard, be.harvestcocAgency, be.eventtype FROM base_event be JOIN all_products p ON p.aggregationeventid = be.idEventRecord ORDER BY be.idEventRecord, p.product_type DESC, p.lotNumber LIMIT @limit OFFSET @offset;
